project: Windows UI Flow Recorder & Smart UI Scanner

0.name: Foundation & Project Skeleton
0.notes: Solution structure, DI wiring, logging, architecture compliance tests

1.name: Domain & Application Contracts
1.notes: All entities, policies, interfaces, service skeletons, domain tests

3.name: Launch Chain Orchestrator
3.notes: ApplicationLaunchOrchestrator, 5 readiness condition types, profile repo, integration tests

4.name: Input Capture & Correlation
4.notes: GlobalInputHook (Win32 hooks), ActionCoalescingPolicy wired, integration tests

5.name: Hierarchy & Screenshot Capture
5.notes: StructuralFingerprint computed in WalkHierarchyAsync via HierarchyRecapturePolicy.ComputeFingerprint(ElementInfo); ApplyWindowSnapshotAsync checks fingerprints via ShouldRecapture before re-capturing windows; OnWindowActivated and FlushCoalescedActionAsync both use re-capture logic; GetMinimumRecaptureInterval maps Sensitivity to TimeSpan (Low=2s, Medium=500ms, High=100ms); Settings.MaxHierarchyElementCount wired to walk calls; ComputeFingerprint(ElementInfo) overload added; 4 new fingerprint tests (different structures, AutomationId change, nested element added, large hierarchy performance)

6.name: Recording Session Orchestration + Recorder UI
6.notes: Full state machine (Idle/Configuring/LaunchingChain/Recording/Paused/Stopped/Reviewing/Exporting/Exported/LaunchFailed); capture pipeline with input queue, coalescing, UIA correlation, screenshot capture; WPF Recorder UI with controls, status bar, always-on-top recording overlay; DI wiring; updated tests

7.name: Export Pipeline
7.notes: Schema self-validation (semver checks, null checks, MAJOR >= 1) in ExportService before write; screenshot references properly collected from session and passed to ExportWriter; relative paths include 'screenshots/' prefix per DataModel.md; folder picker dialog for export destination; Screenshots collection added to RecordingSession; re-export support; schema-validation automated tests; TerminationReason properly determined

8.name: Smart UI Scanner
8.notes: ScannerViewModel with process enumeration, scan, tree navigation, search/filter (by AutomationId/Name/ControlType/ClassName), element details panel, standalone export via ExportService; ScannerView with hierarchy TreeView, search box, details panel, scan/export/refresh buttons; ElementTreeNode with recursive tree, flatten, apply-filter, visible/expanded tracking; ElementHighlightWindow on-screen overlay; wired into MainWindow Scanner tab and DI

9.name: Session/Profile Management + Settings
9.notes: Session List UI with rename/annotate/delete via ISessionRepository; Profile Manager UI with view/edit/duplicate/delete via IApplicationProfileService; Settings UI with screenshot mode, hierarchy sensitivity, default export dir, readiness timeout/poll, max elements, verbose logging — all applied live without restart. All wired into MainWindow tabs and DI.
